title: Wild Growth 🪻
description: Expand your minecraft world with more nature, 49+ new plants and fruit and vegetables to eat!
body:
![wild](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527ae0663b18856f1ee2a3fea2421a1e66c4afbb.png)
Wild Growth Adds a total of ( **45** ) new plants to your minecraft world. This mod means that you will not find empty grass fields in your minecraft server anymore.

![Creative tab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd55310a925b246447ca9ec6403a53483a000bdc.png)

![showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/532d95edeba24228337ce6f7f274aae287a38ca4.png)

![nature](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df85a71ef69e36f8bdf46eafe42c8c43defb604d.png)
![nature](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a73e46af718d5c921ea47c2c6fa8cb3430fec758.png)

![mod info](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25b767237f5c724b59dbe21d4315b2e1d9c3b38a.png)

1 - Fully Compatible With Modded Biomes

2 - All plants have a function. like those in minecraft itself

3 - The plants generate in the overworld/end/nether

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with: intellij

#AD
